objective: PSLQ-exclude any Q-linear relation between V_quad and the polynomial basis Q[π, e, G, ζ(3)]_{total deg ≤ 3} at 2000 dp; emit exclusion_certificate.json on null result.
scope_note: We test the Q-linear formulation: is V_quad in the Q-vector space spanned by the 35 monomials π^a e^b G^c ζ(3)^d with a+b+c+d ≤ 3? The wider 'algebraic over Q(π,e,G,ζ(3))' question requires additionally testing V_quad^2, V_quad^3 against the same basis at extended size; that is documented as an explicit out-of-scope extension under future work. We stay honest about which question this run answers.

nodes.description: Compute V_quad to 100 dp via backward CF recurrence, depth 800
nodes.success_predicate: first 50 digits agree with canonical reference 1.197373990688357602448603219937206329704270703231

nodes.description: Compute V_quad to 500 dp, depths 2000 and 2400; require ≥ 500 digits agreement
Compute V_quad to ≥ 2000 dp at depths 5000 and 6000 (working dps 2200); require ≥ 2000 digits agreement
Compute π, e, Catalan G, ζ(3) at 2050 dps via mpmath built-ins; record SHA-256 of dumped values
nodes.success_predicate: all four constants computed and stable across re-evaluation

nodes.description: Enumerate all monomials π^a e^b G^c ζ(3)^d with a+b+c+d ≤ 3, a,b,c,d ≥ 0, including the constant 1; expected basis_size = 35
nodes.success_predicate: basis_size == 35 and includes (0,0,0,0) and all four singleton monomials

nodes.description: Run mpmath.pslq([V_quad] + basis) at 500 dp, maxcoeff 10^4. Capture: null OR candidate-relation
nodes.success_predicate: PSLQ returns either None (advance to N8) or a candidate (advance to stability re-check at higher dp)

nodes.description: Re-run PSLQ at 2050 dp working precision; require null OR stable-across-tier candidate
nodes.success_predicate: PSLQ result categorised as one of {NULL, STABLE_CANDIDATE, UNSTABLE_NOISE}

nodes.description: Emit exclusion_certificate.json (if NULL) OR verified_relations.json (if STABLE_CANDIDATE survives Stage-4 symbolic check)
nodes.success_predicate: exactly one of the two artefacts is non-empty

nodes.description: Append AEAL claim records (seven-field schema) for: V_quad reference value, agreement digits at each tier, PSLQ verdict
nodes.success_predicate: claims.jsonl exists with ≥ 4 entries, all schema-valid

nodes.description: Compute SHA-256 of every artefact; emit manifest.json. If verdict != GOLD_FREEZE, also emit pending_verification.json (only on PENDING) or simply manifest + exclusion record (on EXCLUSION_CERTIFIED).
Emit report.md with TARGET, executed-stages, evidence table, honest verdict, next-cycle recommendation
nodes.success_predicate: report.md present, contains exactly one verdict tag

nodes.description: Write handoff.md per copilot-instructions STANDING FINAL STEP; stage in siarc-relay-bridge, commit, push
nodes.success_predicate: bridge push succeeded or BRIDGE_FAILED zip emitted

halt_conditions: PSLQ returns conflicting candidates at 500 and 2050 dp (UNSTABLE_NOISE)
any computation produces NaN, inf, or negative precision residual
